steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The phrase “including languages [BLANK] the Madurese and Bikol” presents a category (languages) followed by specific examples (the Madurese and Bikol).

steps.title: Apply the rule for introducing examples
steps.content: A colon introduces examples, lists, or elaborations after a category term. “Including languages: the Madurese and Bikol” correctly uses a colon to signal that specific examples follow. The other choices either omit the needed connector (A), nest em-dashes awkwardly within the existing em-dashed parenthetical (B), or use a comma, which is less standard for introducing a list of examples (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
